function initials(name) {
  return name.split(" ").slice(0, 2).map((w) => w[0]).join("").toUpperCase();
}

export default function App() {
  const [language, setLanguage] = useState("en");
  const [page, setPage] = useState("browse");
  const [selectedJob, setSelectedJob] = useState(null);
  const [savedJobs, setSavedJobs] = useState([]);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("");
  const [filterExp, setFilterExp] = useState("");
  const [filterGender, setFilterGender] = useState("");
  const [filterScheme, setFilterScheme] = useState("");
  const [reportedJobs, setReportedJobs] = useState([]);
  const [voiceLoading, setVoiceLoading] = useState(false);
  const [userMode, setUserMode] = useState("customer");
  const [toast, setToast] = useState("");
  const [postedJobs, setPostedJobs] = useState([]);
  const [postForm, setPostForm] = useState({ title: "", company: "", location: "", salary: "", type: "Full-time", domain: "Farming", desc: "" });
  const [businessProfile, setBusinessProfile] = useState({ name: "Rajesh Transport", owner: "Rajesh Kumar", location: "Neemuch, MP", description: "Reliable local transport service for goods and passengers across Neemuch, Mandsaur and nearby villages.", contact: "+91 98765 43210", website: "", tags: ["Transport", "Local", "Verified"] });
  const [profileUrl, setProfileUrl] = useState(window.location.href + "?profile=owner");
  const [aiSkills, setAiSkills] = useState("");
  const [aiResult, setAiResult] = useState("");
  const [aiLoading, setAiLoading] = useState(false);
  const [employees, setEmployees] = useState([
    { id: 1, name: "Ramesh Kumar", role: "Driver", wageType: "daily", wageAmount: 500, attendance: {}, experience: 18, rating: 4.3 },
    { id: 2, name: "Sunita Bai", role: "Silai Mistri", wageType: "monthly", wageAmount: 9000, attendance: {}, experience: 24, rating: 4.8 },
  ]);
  const [selectedEmployee, setSelectedEmployee] = useState(null);
  const [empForm, setEmpForm] = useState({ name: "", role: "", wageType: "daily", wageAmount: "" });
  const [applications, setApplications] = useState([]);
  const [applyingJob, setApplyingJob] = useState(null);
  const [applyForm, setApplyForm] = useState({ name: "", phone: "", message: "" });
  const [expandedJobId, setExpandedJobId] = useState(null);
  const [online, setOnline] = useState(navigator.onLine);
  const [showMap, setShowMap] = useState(false);

  const t = lang[language];
  const allJobs = [...postedJobs, ...initialJobs];

  useEffect(() => {
    const onlineHandler = () => setOnline(true);
    const offlineHandler = () => setOnline(false);
    window.addEventListener("online", onlineHandler);
    window.addEventListener("offline", offlineHandler);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("online", onlineHandler);
      window.removeEventListener("offline", offlineHandler);
    };
  }, []);

  const filtered = allJobs.filter((job) => {
    const query = search.toLowerCase();
    const matchQuery = !query || job.title.toLowerCase().includes(query) || job.company.toLowerCase().includes(query) || job.location.toLowerCase().includes(query);
    const matchType = !filterType || job.type === filterType;
    const matchExp = !filterExp || job.exp === filterExp;
    const matchGender = !filterGender || job.gender === filterGender;
    const matchScheme = !filterScheme || Boolean(job.scheme);
    return matchQuery && matchType && matchExp && matchGender && matchScheme;
  });

  const displayedJobs = filtered;

  function showToast(msg) {
    setToast(msg);
    setTimeout(() => setToast(""), 2500);
  }

  function toggleSave(job) {
    if (savedJobs.find((j) => j.id === job.id)) {
      setSavedJobs(savedJobs.filter((j) => j.id !== job.id));
      showToast(t.jobRemovedMsg);
    } else {
      setSavedJobs([...savedJobs, job]);
      showToast(t.jobSavedMsg);
    }
  }

  function handlePost() {
    if (!postForm.title || !postForm.company || !postForm.desc) { showToast(t.fillAll); return; }
    const newJob = { ...postForm, id: Date.now(), exp: "Entry", req: ["See description"], skills: [], posted: "Just now", verified: false, hires: 0, gender: "all", scheme: "" };
    setPostedJobs([newJob, ...postedJobs]);
    setPostForm({ title: "", company: "", location: "", salary: "", type: "Full-time", domain: "Farming", desc: "" });
    showToast(t.jobPublished);
    setPage("browse");
  }

  function openApply(job) {
    setApplyingJob(job);
    setApplyForm({ name: "", phone: "", message: "" });
  }

  function submitApplication() {
    if (!applyForm.name.trim() || !applyForm.phone.trim()) { showToast(t.fillAll); return; }
    const newApp = { id: Date.now(), jobId: applyingJob.id, jobTitle: applyingJob.title, name: applyForm.name.trim(), phone: applyForm.phone.trim(), message: applyForm.message.trim(), status: "pending", rating: 0, appliedAt: new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN", { day: "numeric", month: "short" }) };
    setApplications([newApp, ...applications]);
    setApplyingJob(null);
    showToast(t.appSubmitted);
  }

  function toggleHired(appId) {
    setApplications((prev) => prev.map((a) => (a.id === appId ? { ...a, status: a.status === "hired" ? "pending" : "hired" } : a)));
  }

  function rateApplication(appId, value) {
    setApplications((prev) => prev.map((a) => (a.id === appId ? { ...a, rating: value } : a)));
  }

  async function runAIMatch() {
    if (!aiSkills.trim()) { showToast(t.fillAll); return; }
    setAiLoading(true);
    setAiResult("");
    try {
      const jobList = allJobs.map((j) => `${j.id}. ${j.title} at ${j.company}, ${j.location} — ${j.salary}`).join("\n");
      const res = await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
          max_tokens: 800,
          system: `You are a helpful career advisor for rural India, especially Neemuch-Mandsaur area of MP. Respond in ${language === "hi" ? "Hindi" : "English"}. Given a candidate's skills, recommend top 3 job matches with simple encouraging reasons. Format: '1. Job at Company — reason'. Add one short tip. Keep language very simple for village people.`,
          messages: [{ role: "user", content: `My skills: ${aiSkills}\n\nAvailable jobs:\n${jobList}\n\nTop 3 matches?` }],
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      const text = data.content?.map((c) => c.text || "").join("") || "Could not get recommendations.";
      setAiResult(text);
    } catch {
      setAiResult("Could not connect. Please try again.");
    }
    setAiLoading(false);
  }

  function reportJob(jobId) {
    setReportedJobs([...reportedJobs, jobId]);
    showToast(t.reportSuccess);
  }

  function readJobAloud(job) {
    if (!window.speechSynthesis) { showToast(t.readUnavailable); return; }
    const utterance = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(`${job.title}. ${job.company}. ${job.location}. ${job.desc}`);
    utterance.lang = language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-US";
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utterance);
  }

  function startVoiceSearch() {
    const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    if (!SpeechRecognition) { showToast(t.voiceUnavailable); return; }
    setVoiceLoading(true);
    try {
      const recognition = new SpeechRecognition();
      recognition.lang = language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-US";
      recognition.onresult = (e) => { setSearch(e.results[0][0].transcript); setVoiceLoading(false); };
      recognition.onerror = () => setVoiceLoading(false);
      recognition.onend = () => setVoiceLoading(false);
      recognition.start();
    } catch { setVoiceLoading(false); }
  }

  function shareWhatsApp(job) {
    const text = `${job.title} at ${job.company} in ${job.location}. Salary: ${job.salary}. Apply now on JobHub!`;
    window.open(`https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text=${encodeURIComponent(text)}`, "_blank");
  }

  function copyProfileLink() {
    const link = profileUrl || `${window.location.origin}${window.location.pathname}?profile=${encodeURIComponent(businessProfile.name.replace(/\s+/g, "-"))}`;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(link).then(() => showToast("Profile link copied!"));
  }

  function getShareLinkText() {
    return `${businessProfile.name} by ${businessProfile.owner} in ${businessProfile.location}. ${businessProfile.description}`;
  }

  function dateKey(y, m, d) { return `${y}-${m}-${d}`; }

  function handleAddEmployee() {
    if (!empForm.name || !empForm.role || !empForm.wageAmount) { showToast(t.fillAll); return; }
    const newEmp = { id: Date.now(), name: empForm.name, role: empForm.role, wageType: empForm.wageType, wageAmount: Number(empForm.wageAmount), attendance: {}, experience: 0, rating: 0 };
    setEmployees([newEmp, ...employees]);
    setEmpForm({ name: "", role: "", wageType: "daily", wageAmount: "" });
    showToast(t.employeeAdded);
  }

  function removeEmployee(id) {
    if (!window.confirm(t.confirmRemove)) return;
    setEmployees(employees.filter((e) => e.id !== id));
    if (selectedEmployee?.id === id) setSelectedEmployee(null);
  }

  function cycleAttendance(empId, key) {
    setEmployees((prev) => prev.map((e) => {
      if (e.id !== empId) return e;
      const next = { ...e.attendance };
      if (!next[key]) next[key] = "present";
      else if (next[key] === "present") next[key] = "leave";
      else delete next[key];
      return { ...e, attendance: next };
    }));
    setSelectedEmployee((prev) => {
      if (!prev || prev.id !== empId) return prev;
      const next = { ...prev.attendance };
      if (!next[key]) next[key] = "present";
      else if (next[key] === "present") next[key] = "leave";
      else delete next[key];
      return { ...prev, attendance: next };
    });
  }

  function monthStats(emp, year, month) {
    const prefix = `${year}-${month}-`;
    let present = 0, leave = 0;
    Object.keys(emp.attendance).forEach((k) => {
      if (k.startsWith(prefix)) {
        if (emp.attendance[k] === "present") present++;
        else if (emp.attendance[k] === "leave") leave++;
      }
    });
    const salary = emp.wageType === "daily" ? present * emp.wageAmount : Math.max(0, Math.round(emp.wageAmount - leave * (emp.wageAmount / 30)));
    return { present, leave, salary };
  }

  const now = new Date();
  const year = now.getFullYear();
  const month = now.getMonth();
  const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
  const monthName = now.toLocaleDateString(language === "hi" ? "hi-IN" : "en-IN", { month: "long", year: "numeric" });

  const s = {
    app: { fontFamily: "system-ui, sans-serif", minHeight: "100vh", background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #fff7ed 0%, #fff4e1 100%)" },
    navbar: { background: "#fff", borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(226,232,240,0.92)", padding: "0 1rem", height: 64, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", position: "sticky", top: 0, zIndex: 100, gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap", boxShadow: "0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)" },
    logo: { fontWeight: 900, fontSize: 20, color: "#c2410c", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 0.4 },
    dot: { width: 12, height: 12, background: "#f97316", borderRadius: "50%", boxShadow: "0 0 0 6px rgba(249,115,22,0.12)" },
    langBtn: (active) => ({ background: active ? "#f97316" : "#fff", color: active ?     statusBadge: { padding: "6px 12px", borderRadius: 999, fontSize: 11, background: online ? "#ffedd5" : "#fee2e2", color: online ? "#c2410c" : "#b91c1c", fontWeight: 700 },
    hero: { background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #ff7a2d 0%, #fb923c 100%)", padding: "2.3rem 1.2rem 1.6rem", textAlign: "center", borderRadius: 32, margin: "1rem", boxShadow: "0 30px 80px rgba(251,146,60,0.22)" },
    h1: { fontSize: 30, fontWeight: 900, color: "#fff", marginBottom: 10, letterSpacing: 0.5 },

    input: { flex: 1, minWidth: 180, padding: "16px 18px", border: "none", borderRadius: 20, fontSize: 15, outline: "none", boxShadow: "0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.12)", background: "#fff" },
    searchBtn: { background: "#fff", color: "#c2410c", border: "none", borderRadius: 20, padding: "16px 20px", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 800, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 18px 35px rgba(249,115,22,0.18)" },
    voiceBtn: { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.9)", color: "#c2410c", border: "1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.32)", borderRadius: 20, padding: "16px 18px", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 700, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 16px 30px rgba(249,115,22,0.12)" },
    chipRow: { display: "flex", gap: 8, justifyContent: "center", marginTop: 16, flexWrap: "wrap" },
    trustChip: { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.26)", color: "#fff", borderRadius: 999, padding: "8px 14px", fontSize: 12, border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" },
    filtersBar: { display: "flex", gap: 10, padding: "1rem 1.2rem", background: "#fff", borderBottom: "1px solid #f1f5f9", overflowX: "auto", flexWrap: "wrap", boxShadow: "0 20px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.06)", borderRadius: 24, margin: "0 1rem 1rem" },
    select: { border: "1px solid #f0f0f0", background: "#fff", padding: "12px 16px", borderRadius: 20, fontSize: 13, cursor: "pointer", minWidth: 150 },
    chip: (active) => ({ border: "none", background: active ? "#ffedd5" : "#fff1e4", padding: "10px 16px", borderRadius: 999, fontSize: 13, cursor: "pointer", color: active ? "#c2410c" : "#92400e", whiteSpace: "nowrap", boxShadow: active ? "0 12px 28px rgba(249,115,22,0.16)" : "0 10px 20px rgba(15,23,42,0.05)" }),
    layout: { display: "flex", maxHeight: "calc(100vh - 260px)", gap: 18, padding: "0 1rem" },
    jobList: { width: 420, minWidth: 320, borderRight: "none", overflowY: "auto", padding: "0.8rem 0", background: "transparent" },
    jobCard: (selected) => ({ background: "#fff", border: "none", borderRadius: 24, padding: "1.1rem", marginBottom: 16, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: selected ? "0 26px 70px rgba(249,115,22,0.18)" : "0 18px 48px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)", transform: selected ? "translateY(-1px)" : "none", transition: "transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease" }),
    cardTop: { display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, marginBottom: 10 },
    logoBox: (bg, text) => ({ width: 46, height: 46, borderRadius: 16, background: bg, color: text, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontWeight: 800, fontSize: 15, flexShrink: 0 }),
    jobTitle: { fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 800, color: "#111827", lineHeight: 1.25 },
    jobSub: { fontSize: 12, color: "#475569" },
    badgeRow: { display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap", marginTop: 10 },
    badge: (bg, color) => ({ fontSize: 11, padding: "5px 10px", borderRadius: 999, background: bg, color, fontWeight: 700, boxShadow: "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)" }),
    detail: { flex: 1, padding: "1.6rem", overflowY: "auto", background: "#fff", borderRadius: 28, boxShadow: "0 26px 75px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)" },
    empty: { display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", height: 280, color: "#64748b", fontSize: 14, gap: 10, background: "#fff", borderRadius: 24, boxShadow: "0 18px 40px rgba(15,23,42,0.06)" },
    detailTitle: { fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 900, color: "#111827", marginBottom: 8 },
    detailSub: { fontSize: 13, color: "#475569" },
    metaRow: { display: "flex", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap", margin: "1rem 0", padding: "1rem", background: "#fff2ed", borderRadius: 22, boxShadow: "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(249,115,22,0.12)" },
    metaItem: { fontSize: 12, color: "#92400e", fontWeight: 700 },
    applyBtn: { background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #f97316 0%, #fb923c 100%)", color: "#fff", border: "none", borderRadius: 20, padding: "13px 22px", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 800, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 20px 40px rgba(249,115,22,0.22)" },
    saveBtn: (saved) => ({ background: saved ? "#fff7ed" : "#fff", border: "1px solid #fdba74", borderRadius: 20, padding: "11px 16px", cursor: "pointer", color: saved ? "#c2410c" : "#92400e", fontWeight: 700 }),
    section: { marginBottom: "1rem", background: "#fff7f1", borderRadius: 22, padding: "1rem 1.1rem" },
    sectionTitle: { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 800, color: "#c2410c", marginBottom: 10 },
    skillTag: { display: "inline-block", background: "#fff2e7", border: "1px solid #fed7aa", borderRadius: 999, fontSize: 12, padding: "7px 12px", marginRight: 6, marginBottom: 6, color: "#c2410c" },
    page: { maxWidth: 980, margin: "0 auto", padding: "1.3rem 0 1.8rem" },
    formLabel: { display: "block", fontSize: 13, color: "#475569", marginBottom: 6, fontWeight: 700 },
    formInput: { width: "100%", padding: "14px 16px", border: "1px solid #f0f0f0", borderRadius: 18, fontSize: 14, marginBottom: "0.9rem", outline: "none", boxSizing: "border-box", fontFamily: "inherit", background: "#fff", boxShadow: "0 12px 28px rgba(15,23,42,0.05)" },
    formGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 12 },
    submitBtn: { background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", border: "none", borderRadius: 20, padding: "14px", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 800, cursor: "pointer", width: "100%", boxShadow: "0 18px 40px rgba(249,115,22,0.2)" },
    aiBox: { background: "#fff", border: "1px solid #f1f5f9", borderRadius: 26, padding: "1.3rem", marginBottom: "1.2rem", boxShadow: "0 24px 55px rgba(15,23,42,0.06)" },
    aiBtn: { background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #f97316 0%, #fb923c 100%)", color: "#fff", border: "none", borderRadius: 20, padding: "13px 20px", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 800, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 18px 35px rgba(249,115,22,0.24)" },
    aiResult: { background: "#fff", border: "1px solid #f1f5f9", borderRadius: 26, padding: "1.3rem", marginTop: "1rem", boxShadow: "0 24px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.06)" },
    toast: { position: "fixed", bottom: "1.2rem", right: "1.2rem", background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", padding: "10px 16px", borderRadius: 14, fontSize: 13, zIndex: 999, display: toast ? "block" : "none", boxShadow: "0 18px 40px rgba(249,115,22,0.22)" },
    statRow: { display: "flex", gap: 10, marginBottom: "1rem", flexWrap: "wrap" },
    statBox: (bg, color) => ({ background: bg, color, borderRadius: 20, padding: "1rem", flex: 1, minWidth: 140, boxShadow: "inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }),
    statNum: { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 800 },
    statLabel: { fontSize: 11, marginTop: 2, opacity: 0.8 },
    calGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(7, 1fr)", gap: 6, marginTop: 8 },
    calCell: (status) => ({ aspectRatio: "1", borderRadius: 14, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontSize: 13, cursor: "pointer", fontWeight: 700, background: status === "present" ? "#dcfce7" : status === "leave" ? "#fee2e2" : "#f8fafc", color: status === "present" ? "#166534" : status === "leave" ? "#b91c1c" : "#64748b" }),
    legendRow: { display: "flex", gap: 14, marginTop: 8, fontSize: 12, color: "#475569" },
    legendDot: (color) => ({ display: "inline-block", width: 10, height: 10, borderRadius: 3, background: color, marginRight: 5, verticalAlign: "middle" }),
    modalOverlay: { position: "fixed", inset: 0, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.4)", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", zIndex: 1000, padding: "1rem" },
    modalBox: { background: "#fff", borderRadius: 26, padding: "1.6rem", width: "100%", maxWidth: 520, boxShadow: "0 26px 60px rgba(15,23,42,0.18)" },
    applicantCard: { background: "#fff", borderRadius: 24, padding: "1rem", marginBottom: 16, boxShadow: "0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)" },
    hireBtn: (hired) => ({ background: hired ? "#dcfce7" : "#fff", color: hired ? "#166534" : "#c2410c", border: `1px solid ${hired ? "#166534" : "#fb923c"}`, borderRadius: 999, padding: "10px 14px", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, cursor: "pointer" }),
    ratingDot: (active) => ({ width: 18, height: 18, borderRadius: "50%", background: active ? "#fbbf24" : "#e2e8f0", marginRight: 5, cursor: "pointer", display: "inline-block", boxShadow: active ? "0 0 0 1px rgba(251,191,36,0.24)" : "none" }),
    empCard: (selected) => ({ background: selected ? "#fff7ed" : "#fff", border: "none", borderRadius: 24, padding: "1rem", marginBottom: 12, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: selected ? "0 18px 40px rgba(249,115,22,0.14)" : "0 16px 34px rgba(15,23,42,0.05)" }),
    empAvatar: (bg, text) => ({ width: 38, height: 38, borderRadius: "50%", background: bg, color: text, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontWeight: 700, fontSize: 14, flexShrink: 0 }),
    removeLink: { background: "none", border: "none", color: "#c2410c", fontSize: 12, cursor: "pointer", textDecoration: "underline" },
  };

  return (
    <div style={s.app}>
      {/* NAVBAR */}
      <nav style={s.navbar}>
        <div style={s.logo}><div style={s.dot}></div>{t.appName}</div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 4, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
          {userMode === "customer" ? (
            <>
              <button style={s.navBtn(page === "browse")} onClick={() => setPage("browse")}>🏡 {t.browseJobs}</button>
              <button style={s.navBtn(page === "ai")} onClick={() => setPage("ai")}>🤖 {t.aiMatch}</button>
              <button style={s.navBtn(page === "saved")} onClick={() => setPage("saved")}>💾 {t.saved} ({savedJobs.length})</button>
            </>
          ) : (
            <>
              <button style={s.navBtn(page === "employer")} onClick={() => setPage("employer")}>👷 {t.employerDash}</button>
              <button style={s.navBtn(page === "applicants")} onClick={() => setPage("applicants")}>👥 {t.viewApplicants} ({applications.length})</button>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8 }}>
          <button style={{ background: "#fff", color: "#c2410c", border: "2px solid #f97316", borderRadius: 999, padding: "8px 14px", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 700, cursor: "pointer", boxShadow: "0 10px 25px rgba(249,115,22,0.12)" }} onClick={() => { setUserMode(userMode === "customer" ? "owner" : "customer"); setPage(userMode === "customer" ? "employer" : "browse"); }}>{userMode === "customer" ? "👥 " + t.customer : "💼 " + t.owner}</button>
          <span style={s.statusBadge}>{online ? t.online : t.offline}</span>
          <button style={s.langBtn(language === "en")} onClick={() => setLanguage("en")}>EN</button>
          <button style={s.langBtn(language === "hi")} onClick={() => setLanguage("hi")}>हि</button>
          <button style={s.postBtn} onClick={() => setPage("post")}>{t.postJob}</button>
        </div>
      </nav>

      {/* BROWSE PAGE */}
      {page === "browse" && (
        <>
          <div style={s.hero}>
            <h1 style={s.h1}>{t.tagline}</h1>
            <p style={s.sub}>{t.sub}</p>
            <div style={s.searchRow}>
              <input style={s.input} placeholder={t.searchPlaceholder} value={search} onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)} />
              <button style={s.voiceBtn} onClick={startVoiceSearch}>{voiceLoading ? "🎙..." : `🎙 ${t.voiceSearch}`}</button>
              <button style={s.searchBtn}>{t.search}</button>
            </div>
            <div style={s.chipRow}>
              <span style={s.trustChip}>✅ Local jobs</span>
              <span style={s.trustChip}>✅ {t.verifiedEmployer}</span>
              <span style={s.trustChip}>✅ Easy apply</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={s.filtersBar}>
            <select style={s.select} value={filterType} onChange={(e) => setFilterType(e.target.value)}>
              <option value="">{t.allTypes}</option>
              <option value="Full-time">{t.fullTime}</option>
              <option value="Part-time">{t.partTime}</option>
              <option value="Remote">{t.remote}</option>
              <option value="Daily Wage">{t.dailyWage}</option>
              <option value="Internship">{t.internship}</option>
            </select>
            <select style={s.select} value={filterExp} onChange={(e) => setFilterExp(e.target.value)}>
              <option value="">{t.allLevels}</option>
              <option value="Entry">{t.entry}</option>
              <option value="Mid">{t.mid}</option>
              <option value="Senior">{t.senior}</option>
            </select>
            <button style={s.chip(filterGender === "women-only")} onClick={() => setFilterGender(filterGender === "women-only" ? "" : "women-only")}>👩 {t.womenOnly}</button>
            <button style={s.chip(filterGender === "family-friendly")} onClick={() => setFilterGender(filterGender === "family-friendly" ? "" : "family-friendly")}>🏠 {t.familyFriendly}</button>
            <button style={s.chip(filterScheme === "government")} onClick={() => setFilterScheme(filterScheme === "government" ? "" : "government")}>🏛 {t.governmentScheme}</button>
          </div>

          <div style={s.layout}>
            <div style={s.jobList}>
              {displayedJobs.length === 0 && <p style={{ color: "#aaa", textAlign: "center", marginTop: "2rem", fontSize: 14 }}>{t.noJobs}</p>}
              {displayedJobs.map((job, i) => {
                const c = colors[i % colors.length];
                const isSaved = !!savedJobs.find((j) => j.id === job.id);
                const isReported = reportedJobs.includes(job.id);
                return (
                  <div key={job.id} style={s.jobCard(selectedJob?.id === job.id)} onClick={() => setSelectedJob(job)}>
                    <div style={s.cardTop}>
                      <div style={s.logoBox(c.bg, c.text)}>{initials(job.company)}</div>
                      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <div style={s.jobTitle}>{job.title}</div>
                        <div style={s.jobSub}>{job.company} {job.verified ? <span style={{ display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 4, background: "#E6F1FB", color: "#185FA5", borderRadius: 999, padding: "2px 8px", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 700, marginLeft: 6 }}>✅</span> : null} · {job.location}</div>
                      </div>
                      <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleSave(job); }} style={{ background: "none", border: "none", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 20, color: isSaved ? "#FAC775" : "#ddd" }}>★</button>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.badgeRow}>
                      <span style={s.badge("#FAEEDA", "#854F0B")}>{job.type}</span>
                      <span style={s.badge("#FAECE7", "#993C1D")}>{job.salary}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, marginTop: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                      <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); shareWhatsApp(job); }} style={{ fontSize: 12, background: "#25D366", color: "#fff", border: "none", borderRadius: 8, padding: "5px 10px", cursor: "pointer", fontWeight: 700 }}>📲 {t.shareWhatsApp}</button>
                      {!isReported && <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); reportJob(job.id); }} style={{ fontSize: 12, background: "#fff", color: "#A32D2D", border: "1px solid #ddd", borderRadius: 8, padding: "5px 10px", cursor: "pointer" }}>⚠️ {t.reportThis}</button>}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>

            <div style={s.detail}>
              {!selectedJob ? (
                <div style={s.empty}><span style={{ fontSize: 48 }}>💼</span><p>{t.selectJob}</p></div>
              ) : (
                <>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                    <div>
                      <div style={s.detailTitle}>{selectedJob.title}</div>
                      <div style={s.detailSub}>{selectedJob.company} · {selectedJob.location} · {t.posted} {selectedJob.posted}</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
                      <button style={s.saveBtn(!!savedJobs.find((j) => j.id === selectedJob.id))} onClick={() => toggleSave(selectedJob)}>{savedJobs.find((j) => j.id === selectedJob.id) ? `★ ${t.saved2}` : `☆ ${t.save}`}</button>
                      <button style={s.applyBtn} onClick={() => openApply(selectedJob)}>{t.applyNow}</button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={s.metaRow}>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>📍 {selectedJob.location}</span>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>⏰ {selectedJob.type}</span>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>💰 {selectedJob.salary}</span>
                    <span style={s.metaItem}>👥 {selectedJob.hires || 0} {t.hiresCount}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, marginBottom: "1rem", flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                    <button onClick={() => readJobAloud(selectedJob)} style={{ fontSize: 13, background: "#fff", color: "#185FA5", border: "1px solid #ddd", borderRadius: 8, padding: "7px 12px", cursor: "pointer" }}>🔊 {t.readAloud}</button>
                    <button onClick={() => shareWhatsApp(selectedJob)} style={{ fontSize: 13, background: "#25D366", color: "#fff", border: "none", borderRadius: 8, padding: "7px 12px", cursor: "pointer", fontWeight: 700 }}>📲 {t.shareWhatsApp}</button>
                  </div>
                  <div style={s.section}><div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.aboutRole}</div><p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#555", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>{selectedJob.desc}</p></div>
                  <div style={s.section}><div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.requirements}</div><ul style={{ paddingLeft: "1.2rem" }}>{selectedJob.req.map((r, i) => <li key={i} style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#555", lineHeight: 1.8 }}>{r}</li>)}</ul></div>
                  <div style={s.section}><div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.skills}</div><div>{selectedJob.skills.map((sk) => <span key={sk} style={s.skillTag}>{sk}</span>)}</div></div>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {/* AI MATCH */}
      {page === "ai" && (
        <div style={s.page}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 6 }}>{t.aiMatchTitle}</h2>
          <p style={{ color: "#666", fontSize: 14, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>{t.aiMatchSub}</p>
          <div style={s.aiBox}>
            <textarea style={{ width: "100%", border: "none", outline: "none", fontSize: 14, lineHeight: 1.6, resize: "vertical", minHeight: 90, background: "transparent", fontFamily: "inherit" }} placeholder={t.aiPlaceholder} value={aiSkills} onChange={(e) => setAiSkills(e.target.value)} />
          </div>
          <button style={s.aiBtn} onClick={runAIMatch} disabled={aiLoading}>{aiLoading ? t.matching : t.matchBtn}</button>
          {aiResult && <div style={s.aiResult}><h3 style={{ fontSize: 15, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 8 }}>✨ {t.topMatches}</h3><p style={{ fontSize: 14, color: "#555", lineHeight: 1.8, whiteSpace: "pre-wrap" }}>{aiResult}</p></div>}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* SAVED */}
      {page === "saved" && (
        <div style={s.page}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>{t.savedJobs}</h2>
          {savedJobs.length === 0 ? <div style={s.empty}><span style={{ fontSize: 48 }}>🔖</span><p>{t.noSaved}</p></div>
            : savedJobs.map((job, i) => {
              const c = colors[i % colors.length];
              return (
                <div key={job.id} style={s.jobCard(false)} onClick={() => { setSelectedJob(job); setPage("browse"); }}>
                  <div style={s.cardTop}>
                    <div style={s.logoBox(c.bg, c.text)}>{initials(job.company)}</div>
                    <div><div style={s.jobTitle}>{job.title}</div><div style={s.jobSub}>{job.company} · {job.location}</div></div>
                    <span style={s.badge("#FAEEDA", "#854F0B")}>{job.salary}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* APPLICANTS */}
      {page === "applicants" && (
        <div style={s.page}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>{t.allApplications}</h2>
          {applications.length === 0 ? <div style={s.empty}><span style={{ fontSize: 48 }}>📬</span><p>{t.noApplicationsYet}</p></div>
            : applications.map((app) => (
              <div key={app.id} style={s.applicantCard}>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 10, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                  <div>
                    <strong style={{ fontSize: 15 }}>{app.name}</strong>
                    <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#666", margin: "4px 0" }}>📞 <a href={`tel:${app.phone}`} style={{ color: "#185FA5", textDecoration: "none" }}>{app.phone}</a></p>
                    <p style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "#888", margin: "2px 0" }}>🧾 {app.jobTitle} · {t.appliedOn} {app.appliedAt}</p>
                    {app.message && <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#555", fontStyle: "italic", margin: "6px 0" }}>💬 {app.message}</p>}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 8, alignItems: "flex-end" }}>
                    <button style={s.hireBtn(app.status === "hired")} onClick={() => toggleHired(app.id)}>{app.status === "hired" ? t.hired : t.markHired}</button>
                    <div>{Array.from({ length: 5 }, (_, i) => <span key={i} style={s.ratingDot(app.rating > i)} onClick={() => rateApplication(app.id, i + 1)}></span>)}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* EMPLOYER / EMPLOYEE DASHBOARD */}
      {page === "employer" && (
        <div style={{ ...s.page, display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1.4fr 1.6fr", gap: 16 }}>
          {/* Left: Business profile */}
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>🏢 {businessProfile.name}</h2>
            <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: 24, padding: "1.3rem", marginBottom: 18, boxShadow: "0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)" }}>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 12, flexWrap: "wrap", marginBottom: 14 }}>
                <div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 700 }}>{businessProfile.owner}</div>
                  <div style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#475569", marginTop: 4 }}>{businessProfile.location}</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                  <button style={{ ...s.postBtn, padding: "10px 14px", fontSize: 12 }} onClick={copyProfileLink}>🔗 Share Profile</button>
                  <button style={{ ...s.postBtn, padding: "10px 14px", fontSize: 12, background: "#10b981" }} onClick={() => window.open(`https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text=${encodeURIComponent(getShareLinkText() + ' ' + profileUrl)}`, "_blank")}>📲 WhatsApp</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <p style={{ color: "#334155", lineHeight: 1.7, marginBottom: 12 }}>{businessProfile.description}</p>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap", marginBottom: 12 }}>
                {businessProfile.tags.map((tag) => <span key={tag} style={{ background: "#f8fafc", color: "#1f2937", borderRadius: 999, padding: "6px 10px", fontSize: 12, border: "1px solid #e2e8f0" }}>{tag}</span>)}
              </div>
              <div style={{ display: "grid", gap: 10 }}>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 12 }}><span style={s.metaItem}>📞</span><span style={{ color: "#475569" }}>{businessProfile.contact}</span></div>
                {businessProfile.website && <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 12 }}><span style={s.metaItem}>🌐</span><a href={businessProfile.website} target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" style={{ color: "#1d4ed8", textDecoration: "none" }}>{businessProfile.website}</a></div>}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: 24, padding: "1.3rem", boxShadow: "0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,0.08)" }}>
              <h3 style={{ fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 12 }}>Update business profile</h3>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>Business name</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} value={businessProfile.name} onChange={(e) => setBusinessProfile({ ...businessProfile, name: e.target.value })} />
              <label style={s.formLabel}>Owner name</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} value={businessProfile.owner} onChange={(e) => setBusinessProfile({ ...businessProfile, owner: e.target.value })} />
              <label style={s.formLabel}>Location</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} value={businessProfile.location} onChange={(e) => setBusinessProfile({ ...businessProfile, location: e.target.value })} />
              <label style={s.formLabel}>Description</label>
              <textarea style={{ ...s.formInput, minHeight: 96, resize: "vertical" }} value={businessProfile.description} onChange={(e) => setBusinessProfile({ ...businessProfile, description: e.target.value })} />
              <label style={s.formLabel}>Contact</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} value={businessProfile.contact} onChange={(e) => setBusinessProfile({ ...businessProfile, contact: e.target.value })} />
              <label style={s.formLabel}>Website (optional)</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} value={businessProfile.website} onChange={(e) => setBusinessProfile({ ...businessProfile, website: e.target.value })} />
            </div>
          </div>
          {/* Right: Attendance calendar */}
          <div>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>👷 {t.employerDash}</h2>
            <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: 14, padding: "1rem", marginBottom: 14, border: "1px dashed #ccc" }}>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.employeeName}</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Ramesh Kumar" value={empForm.name} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, name: e.target.value })} />
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.employeeRole}</label>
              <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Driver, Mistri" value={empForm.role} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, role: e.target.value })} />
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.wageType}</label>
              <select style={s.formInput} value={empForm.wageType} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, wageType: e.target.value })}>
                <option value="daily">{t.dailyWageOpt}</option>
                <option value="monthly">{t.monthlyWageOpt}</option>
              </select>
              <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.wageAmount}</label>
              <input type="number" style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. 500" value={empForm.wageAmount} onChange={(e) => setEmpForm({ ...empForm, wageAmount: e.target.value })} />
              <button style={s.submitBtn} onClick={handleAddEmployee}>{t.addBtn}</button>
            </div>
            {employees.length === 0 ? <p style={{ color: "#aaa", fontSize: 14 }}>{t.noEmployees}</p>
              : employees.map((emp, i) => {
                const stats = monthStats(emp, year, month);
                const c = colors[i % colors.length];
                return (
                  <div key={emp.id} style={s.empCard(selectedEmployee?.id === emp.id)} onClick={() => setSelectedEmployee(emp)}>
                    <div style={s.cardTop}>
                      <div style={s.empAvatar(c.bg, c.text)}>{initials(emp.name)}</div>
                      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}><div style={s.jobTitle}>{emp.name}</div><div style={s.jobSub}>{emp.role}</div></div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={s.badgeRow}>
                      <span style={s.badge("#D9F0E0", "#1B7A43")}>{stats.present} {t.daysPresent}</span>
                      <span style={s.badge("#FDE8E8", "#A35A0B")}>{stats.leave} {t.daysLeave}</span>
                      <span style={s.badge("#EAF3DE", "#3B6D11")}>₹{stats.salary}</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
          </div>

          {/* Right: Attendance calendar */}
          <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: 14, padding: "1.2rem" }}>
            {!selectedEmployee ? (
              <div style={s.empty}><span style={{ fontSize: 46 }}>🧑‍🔧</span><p>{t.selectEmployeeMsg}</p></div>
            ) : (() => {
              const emp = employees.find((e) => e.id === selectedEmployee.id) || selectedEmployee;
              const stats = monthStats(emp, year, month);
              return (
                <>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start", marginBottom: "1rem" }}>
                    <div><div style={s.detailTitle}>{emp.name}</div><div style={s.detailSub}>{emp.role} · {emp.wageType === "daily" ? `₹${emp.wageAmount}${t.perDay}` : `₹${emp.wageAmount}${t.perMonth}`}</div></div>
                    <button style={s.removeLink} onClick={() => removeEmployee(emp.id)}>{t.removeWorker}</button>
                  </div>
                  <div style={s.statRow}>
                    <div style={s.statBox("#E6F1FB", "#185FA5")}><div style={s.statNum}>{stats.present}</div><div style={s.statLabel}>{t.daysPresent}</div></div>
                    <div style={s.statBox("#FDE8E8", "#A35A0B")}><div style={s.statNum}>{stats.leave}</div><div style={s.statLabel}>{t.daysLeave}</div></div>
                    <div style={s.statBox("#EAF3DE", "#3B6D11")}><div style={s.statNum}>₹{stats.salary}</div><div style={s.statLabel}>{t.estSalary}</div></div>
                  </div>
                  <div style={s.sectionTitle}>{t.thisMonth} — {monthName}</div>
                  <p style={{ fontSize: 12, color: "#888", margin: "6px 0 10px" }}>{t.tapToMark}</p>
                  <div style={s.calGrid}>
                    {Array.from({ length: daysInMonth }, (_, idx) => {
                      const day = idx + 1;
                      const key = dateKey(year, month, day);
                      const status = emp.attendance[key];
                      return <div key={day} style={s.calCell(status)} onClick={() => cycleAttendance(emp.id, key)}>{day}</div>;
                    })}
                  </div>
                  <div style={s.legendRow}>
                    <span><span style={s.legendDot("#1B7A43")}></span>{t.legendPresent}</span>
                    <span><span style={s.legendDot("#A35A0B")}></span>{t.legendLeave}</span>
                    <span><span style={s.legendDot("#ccc")}></span>{t.legendUnmarked}</span>
                  </div>
                </>
              );
            })()}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* POST JOB */}
      {page === "post" && (
        <div style={s.page}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: 22, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>{t.postTitle}</h2>
          <div style={s.formGrid}>
            <div><label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobTitle}</label><input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Driver, Mistri, Teacher" value={postForm.title} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, title: e.target.value })} /></div>
            <div><label style={s.formLabel}>{t.companyName}</label><input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Ramesh Ji ka Kaam" value={postForm.company} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, company: e.target.value })} /></div>
          </div>
          <div style={s.formGrid}>
            <div><label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobLocation}</label><input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Neemuch, Mandsaur" value={postForm.location} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, location: e.target.value })} /></div>
            <div><label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobSalary}</label><input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. ₹500/day" value={postForm.salary} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, salary: e.target.value })} /></div>
          </div>
          <div style={s.formGrid}>
            <div><label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobType}</label>
              <select style={s.formInput} value={postForm.type} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, type: e.target.value })}>
                <option value="Full-time">{t.fullTime}</option>
                <option value="Part-time">{t.partTime}</option>
                <option value="Daily Wage">{t.dailyWage}</option>
                <option value="Internship">{t.internship}</option>
              </select></div>
            <div><label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobDomain}</label>
              <select style={s.formInput} value={postForm.domain} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, domain: e.target.value })}>
                <option>Farming</option><option>Construction</option><option>Teaching</option>
                <option>Healthcare</option><option>Transport</option><option>Skilled Work</option>
                <option>Government</option><option>Technical</option><option>Other</option>
              </select></div>
          </div>
          <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.jobDesc}</label>
          <textarea style={{ ...s.formInput, minHeight: 100, resize: "vertical" }} placeholder="Kaam ke baare mein batayen..." value={postForm.desc} onChange={(e) => setPostForm({ ...postForm, desc: e.target.value })} />
          <button style={s.submitBtn} onClick={handlePost}>{t.publish}</button>

          <div style={{ marginTop: 32, borderTop: "1px solid #eee", paddingTop: 16 }}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: "1rem" }}>{t.yourPostedJobs}</h3>
            {postedJobs.length === 0 ? <p style={{ color: "#aaa", fontSize: 14 }}>{t.noPostedJobsYet}</p>
              : postedJobs.map((job) => {
                const apps = applications.filter((a) => a.jobId === job.id);
                const expanded = expandedJobId === job.id;
                return (
                  <div key={job.id} style={{ background: "#fff", border: "1px solid #eee", borderRadius: 12, padding: "1rem", marginBottom: 12 }}>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                      <div><div style={s.jobTitle}>{job.title}</div><div style={s.jobSub}>{job.company} · {job.location}</div></div>
                      <button style={s.chip(expanded)} onClick={() => setExpandedJobId(expanded ? null : job.id)}>{apps.length} {t.applicantsLabel} {expanded ? "▲" : "▼"}</button>
                    </div>
                    {expanded && apps.length > 0 && (
                      <div style={{ marginTop: 12, borderTop: "1px solid #f0f0f0", paddingTop: 12 }}>
                        {apps.map((app) => (
                          <div key={app.id} style={s.applicantCard}>
                            <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", gap: 8, flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
                              <div>
                                <strong>{app.name}</strong>
                                <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#666", margin: "4px 0" }}>📞 <a href={`tel:${app.phone}`} style={{ color: "#185FA5", textDecoration: "none" }}>{app.phone}</a></p>
                                {app.message && <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#555", fontStyle: "italic" }}>💬 {app.message}</p>}
                              </div>
                              <button style={s.hireBtn(app.status === "hired")} onClick={() => toggleHired(app.id)}>{app.status === "hired" ? t.hired : t.markHired}</button>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                );
              })}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* APPLY MODAL */}
      {applyingJob && (
        <div style={s.modalOverlay} onClick={() => setApplyingJob(null)}>
          <div style={s.modalBox} onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: 18, fontWeight: 700, marginBottom: 6 }}>{t.applyFormTitle}</h3>
            <p style={{ fontSize: 13, color: "#666", marginBottom: "1rem" }}>{applyingJob.title} · {applyingJob.company}</p>
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourName}</label>
            <input style={s.formInput} placeholder="e.g. Suresh Patel" value={applyForm.name} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, name: e.target.value })} />
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourPhone}</label>
            <input style={s.formInput} type="tel" placeholder="e.g. 98765 43210" value={applyForm.phone} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, phone: e.target.value })} />
            <label style={s.formLabel}>{t.yourMessage}</label>
            <textarea style={{ ...s.formInput, minHeight: 80, resize: "vertical" }} value={applyForm.message} onChange={(e) => setApplyForm({ ...applyForm, message: e.target.value })} />
            <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 10 }}>
              <button style={{ ...s.submitBtn, background: "#fff", color: "#444", border: "1px solid #ddd" }} onClick={() => setApplyingJob(null)}>{t.cancel}</button>
              <button style={s.submitBtn} onClick={submitApplication}>{t.submitApplication}</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <div style={s.toast}>{toast}</div>
    </div>
  );
}
